_doc: Free-tier parameter manifest for the Sound Generator 2.0 iteration loop (docs/SOUND_GENERATOR_2_PLAN.md §2.4). Only optimiser-adjustable params are listed; pinned-tier params (set directly from measurement) are named at the bottom. Bounds mirror the sub-note inspector knobs (app.js chInspectorHTML) so every fitted preset is reachable and editable in the UI. WP-4 consumes this file; WP-9's ledger keys off the same names.

bodyType.values: enumerate at runtime: 'auto' + Object.keys(BODY_PRESETS) from web/static/synth.js
bodyType.note: candidate set restricted per family before optimisation (e.g. sung → vocal bodies + auto)

continuous.note: shape/freq/decay of the transient are pinned from measurement; only the level is free
neutral legacy routing at 0; opt in when the note ADSR masks a measured fast onset
pinned to suggestedMaterial where a T60 fit exists; free only for instruments without free-decay evidence

structured.bodyBands: per-band {freq,gain,width} trims on the selected body preset; gains free within ±6 dB of preset, freq/width free within ±15% — fitted after the continuous pass, one band at a time
structured.spectralPartialMeans: per-partial level offsets vs the computed print; fitted CLOSED-FORM from the reference spectra (never by the optimiser)

pinnedFromMeasurement: spectralPartialMeans base tables (per register once G1 lands)
materialT60 fit (t60Ref, slope) where free decay was measured

fixed._note: density pinned at 64 during fitting (audibility culling handles cost); presets may ship lower only if the A/B audition can't tell the difference
